keyframes.name: tagIn
sparkRise
baPulse

rulesRelevantes: .drawer-panel { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; right: 0px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-bottom-left-radius: 24px; border-bottom-right-radius: 24px; padding: 14px 16px 20px; box-shadow: rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.24) 0px 24px 48px -16px; transform: translateY(-102%); transition: transform 0.36s cubic-bezier(0.22, 0.85, 0.3, 1); }

.show-card { position: relative; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: var(--p-radius-show); border: 1px solid var(--w100); box-shadow: rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.04) 0px 1px 2px, rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.06) 0px 12px 32px -8px; padding: 36px 32px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; transition: transform 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.3s, opacity 0.55s; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(28px); overflow: hidden; }

.show-card .badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; align-self: flex-start; height: 30px; padding: 0px 14px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.005em; }
button.show-mock { appearance: none; border: 0px; background: transparent; padding: 0px; cursor: zoom-in; font: inherit; color: inherit; text-align: left; width: 100%; position: relative; }
button.show-mock:focus-visible { outline: rgb(26, 115, 232) solid 2px; outline-offset: 4px; border-radius: 14px; }
.show-mock { margin-top: 4px; flex: 1 1 0%; min-height: 380px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center; }

.show-mock .zoom-hint { position: absolute; top: 14px; right: 14px; width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.55); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.9); transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s; pointer-events: none; }
.show-card .more { margin-top: 8px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: rgb(26, 115, 232); text-decoration: none; }
.zoom-modal .zoom-inner { position: relative; max-width: min(1100px, 92vw); max-height: 88vh; transform: scale(0.96); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); }
.mk-fup .dots { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; justify-content: flex-end; }

.ba-cell.before .strike::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; top: 50%; height: 1px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22); transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left center; transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.6, 0.2, 0.2, 1) 0.2s; }
.ba-mini-bar i { display: block; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg,var(--cyan),#10CF95); border-radius: 3px; width: 0px; transition: width 1.4s cubic-bezier(0.6, 0.2, 0.2, 1) 0.4s; }

button.feat-shell .zoom-hint { position: absolute; top: 14px; right: 14px; width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.55); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.92); transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s; pointer-events: none; }
.reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(16px); transition: opacity 0.7s, transform 0.7s; }
